transcript.text: Hi, living in Boulder, V-Log, November 16th, 2019, Saturday, 728 p.m.

Gotta look at the camera here.
Last night, yesterday I got good news, don't want to say what it is, but so I was like, what do you do when you, oh right, you drink, so I wanted to go drink.
Um, had a, um, $8 thing of, um, of, um, of, um, Jagermeister, but that wasn't enough, so I went back and got another one, so.
Spent 16 bucks in Jagermeister, and then I think I was working on my website, mainly, um, and listening to music last night, and then I think I, like, went to sleep.
I, I, I, I, I woke up not hungover at all, but I still don't remember, so maybe I, like, blacked out, but I am not hungover, because I totally took my time drinking him.
Um, and, um, yeah, I got up today at, like, afternoon time and, uh, went into my mom's house.

Um, yesterday I had some, like, errands, I had to go to my mom's house to help her with some stuff, and then took my roommate's car in to get the oil changed, and some fluid topped off, and what else, um, but today I went into my mom's house to help her with, um, her extra room, organized, uh, fixing, putting the bed back together in the desk, because she had it painted, she wants to rent it out.
Um, so, uh, that's, uh, and that, and then I had a big old meal over there, so kind of spent some time over there.

Um, I, I had my, uh, I guess over the last few days, three or four days, a couple days, I've had my version of maybe, like, a slump, because I've been, uh, I guess maybe working for her more, and sleeping more, and, um, what day is it?
I said what day it was at the beginning of the video, but I'm, like, really high right now.

I'm, like, oh, I gotta do a video, alright, well, let's get really high first.

I did it with just two stairs instead of all of them, which is good enough.
